name: Rusted Cleaver
effect: +30% melee damage. Simple, brutal, reliably lethal at close range.

name: "Da Big Choppa"
effect: +80% melee damage, −30% movement speed. Cleaves multiple adjacent enemies in a single swing.

name: Nuclear Scrap Bomb
effect: Single-use massive AOE explosion. Irradiates the territory for 3 cycles after detonation.

name: Spiked Armor
effect: Anyone who strikes this unit in melee takes 15% reflected damage. Touch the Horde and bleed.

name: "Lucky Plate"
effect: 10% chance to completely negate any single incoming hit. The scratch on the plate that stopped the killshot.

name: Grog Flask
effect: +20% melee damage, +10% movement speed, −15% accuracy for 10 seconds. Worth it.

name: Waaagh! Banner
effect: AOE aura: +10% damage and +10% speed to all Horde units within 20m. Morale weapon.

name: Acid-Dipped (Vorax salvage)
effect: +25% damage specifically vs Vorax. Reverse-engineered Vorax acid applied to projectile tips.

name: Boom-Stick
effect: Sawn-off double-barrel cobbled from pipe fittings and a pressure valve. Fires anything that fits. Kicks like a grox. Breaks after 3 shots. Immediately replaced with another Boom-Stick.

name: Scrap-Weave Hide
effect: Layers of salvaged plating, chain links, stripped circuitry and Vorax chitin bolted onto flesh. Crude but thick. Pain tolerance is the real defense.

name: Salvage Magnet
effect: Extends Wreckage Salvage collection radius from 30m to 45m. More deaths in range = more stacks.
